# WEUX Content Finder

> WEUX Content Finder is a WordPress plugin that helps editors and site teams find where content is managed across posts, pages, custom post types, templates, patterns, navigation, Elementor data, and supported ACF fields.

Website: [WEUX Content Finder](https://contentfinderwp.com/)
WordPress plugin: [WEUX Content Finder on WordPress.org](https://wordpress.org/plugins/weux-content-finder/)

## Who it is for

- WordPress agencies
- Freelancers maintaining client sites
- Editorial teams
- WordPress maintenance and support teams

## Core capabilities

- Search content across WordPress posts, pages, custom post types, templates, template parts, synced patterns, navigation menus, block theme files, Elementor data, and supported ACF matches.
- Show match context, result type, snippets, status, and editor links where WordPress provides them.
- Open the best available editor target, including Site Editor, Elementor, or the standard WordPress editor when available.
- Keep discovery separate from mutation: Free finds content; Pro adds reviewed Search and Replace workflows.

## Free version

- Search all supported content layers.
- Direct editor links where available.
- Elementor links where detected.
- ACF count teaser.
- No Search and Replace.

## Pro version

- Everything in Free.
- Search and Replace with preview.
- Before/after diffs.
- Selective replacement.
- Batch undo.
- Replace job history.
- Supported text-like ACF field search and replace.
- Global Cmd+K overlay.
- Lemon Squeezy license activation.

## Pricing

- Free: €0
- Single Site: €39/year
- 5 Sites: €79/year
- Unlimited: €149/year

## Trust and safety

- Free search runs inside WordPress and does not require an external search service.
- The product is editor-focused and is not a database migration tool.
- Theme-file, classic menu, Elementor, and ACF support depend on supported WordPress structures.
- Pro replacement workflows are preview-first and designed around review, selected updates, job history, and undo.

## Important pages

- [Homepage](https://contentfinderwp.com/): Product overview and primary download path.
- [Pricing and comparison](https://contentfinderwp.com/#comparison): Free, Single Site, 5 Sites, and Unlimited plans.
- [Search coverage](https://contentfinderwp.com/#coverage): Supported WordPress content layers.
- [Pro features](https://contentfinderwp.com/#pro): Preview-first Search and Replace workflow.
- [FAQ](https://contentfinderwp.com/#faq): Common installation, privacy, Elementor, ACF, and pricing questions.
- [Trust and safety](https://contentfinderwp.com/#trust): Local search, license privacy, replacement review, and supported structures.
